sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87506" key="proqera/peusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προθερᾰ´π-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, Donat.ad Ter.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Adelph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">481</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
